emails.body: Re: EOL Help Desk Question, CP ID 5177 SaskEnergy Incorporated, Global Contract 96013849 Hi Tana, Further to Karen Lambert's email below, could you please let me know what the status is with SaskEnergy? Are they understanding the fact that their EOL transactions will fall under the Master Agreement's terms and conditions? Let me know if I need to contact them. Thanks, Matilda Forwarded by Matilda Machado/CAL/ECT on 03/09/2001 08:31 AM From: Karen Lambert on 03/08/2001 03:32 PM CST
